blockr.session 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Implementing a custom storage backend
  • Changelog

Package index

Board management plugin

The navbar plugin that adds project save, history and restore to a board.

manage_project() manage_project_server() manage_project_ui()
Project management

Storage backend contract

The generics and constructors a custom rack storage backend implements.

new_rack_id() new_rack_record() rack_content_hash() rack_name() rack_rename() rack_exists() rack_list() as_rack_id() rack_info() rack_download() rack_upload() rack_delete() rack_purge() rack_capabilities() rack_tags() rack_set_tags() rack_acl() rack_set_acl() rack_share() rack_unshare() rack_shares() rack_find_users()
Rack storage backend contract

Saving and loading

The high-level save and load API, and the board loader that restores from a request URL.

rack_create() rack_append()
Create or append to a session record on a rack backend
rack_load()
Load a session from a rack backend
rack_loader()
Rack-backed board loader

Default pins backend

The shipped storage backend, resolving per-user pin storage on Posit Connect.

user_pins_board()
Posit Connect storage backend with graceful fallback

On this page

Developed by Nicolas Bennett, Christoph Sax, Bristol Myers Squibb.
